description: VoidLink ELF structural indicators for Malscope StaticAnalyzer

indicators.name: no_dynamic_linker
indicators.description: ELF has no PT_INTERP segment — statically linked binary. VoidLink is compiled with -nostdlib (Zig/C freestanding). No /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2.
indicators.note: Most legitimate user-space ELF binaries use the dynamic linker. Static linking without libc is a strong indicator of deliberate evasion or malware.

indicators.name: zero_plt_imports
indicators.description: No PLT (Procedure Linkage Table) entries — binary makes raw syscalls, not libc calls. VoidLink bypasses libc entirely to avoid userspace hooking by EDRs.
indicators.note: Absence of .plt in a non-trivial ELF binary is a strong signal. Legitimate freestanding code exists but is rare outside bootloaders and kernel modules.

indicators.name: no_libc_symbols
indicators.description: Zero imports from libc (no read, write, malloc, printf in .dynsym). VoidLink uses raw syscall instructions to bypass userspace hooking.
indicators.note: Combined with other indicators. A binary with no libc symbol imports AND that creates network connections is highly suspicious.

indicators.name: voidlink_section_names
indicators.description: ELF section names beginning with .vl_ — VoidLink-specific linker section naming convention identified by Ontinue.
indicators.note: VoidLink-specific. No known legitimate software uses .vl_* section names.

indicators.name: memfd_create_symbol_reference
indicators.description: String 'memfd_create' present in binary but not as a dynamic import (used as a direct syscall invocation reference or log string). Fileless execution indicator.
indicators.note: Presence as a string literal (e.g., for logging) combined with direct syscall number 319 in .text is a strong indicator of fileless execution technique.

indicators.name: execveat_symbol_reference
indicators.description: String 'execveat' present in binary — references syscall 322 used for executing code from anonymous file descriptors (AT_EMPTY_PATH pattern).

indicators.name: zig_compiler_artifact
indicators.description: Zig-compiled binary: presence of characteristic Zig panic/overflow strings. VoidLink (and de-voidlink) are Zig-compiled. Combined with other indicators, confirms implant lineage.
indicators.note: Alone this is not sufficient — many benign Zig programs exist. Strong when combined with network/syscall indicators.

indicators.name: prctl_magic_bytes
indicators.description: Magic bytes 0x564C ('VL') present in binary — VoidLink PRCTL_MAGIC constant used to signal the implant has performed its prctl masquerade step.

check.note: Little-endian encoding of 0x564C. Search within .text/.rodata sections.

indicators.name: high_section_entropy
indicators.description: ELF section entropy >= 7.0/8.0. VoidLink measured at 7.24/8.0 by Ontinue — high entropy indicates encrypted or compressed content consistent with runtime decryption.
indicators.note: High entropy alone is insufficient. Must be combined with other VoidLink indicators.

indicators.name: syscall_number_319_in_text
indicators.description: Raw syscall number 319 (memfd_create) appears as an immediate value in .text section — confirms direct syscall invocation pattern used by VoidLink to bypass libc hooks.

check.note: Little-endian encoding of 319 (0x13F). Pattern: C7 C0 3F 01 00 00 (mov eax, 319) or similar mov variants.

indicators.name: syscall_number_322_in_text
indicators.description: Raw syscall number 322 (execveat) appears as an immediate value in .text section — confirms fileless execution technique.

indicators.name: plugin_api_symbols_in_binary
indicators.description: plugin_init, plugin_exec, plugin_cleanup, plugin_info strings present in binary — VoidLink/de-voidlink plugin architecture strings from plugin_api.h, used by ELF .o loader.
indicators.note: 3+ of 4 plugin API strings present is highly specific to VoidLink's modular plugin architecture.

composite_rules.name: voidlink_core_implant
composite_rules.description: Composite rule: statically-linked binary with direct syscalls for fileless execution

composite_rules.name: voidlink_confirmed_by_magic
composite_rules.description: Composite rule: VoidLink confirmed by magic bytes + Zig compiler + plugin API

composite_rules.name: voidlink_fileless_execution_capability
composite_rules.description: Composite rule: binary has the raw syscall numbers for memfd_create + execveat fileless execution
